overview.description: The Corgi Growth & Technology 10% Structured Buffer ETF - May Series (QMY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is an actively managed ETF, using FLEX options to provide the price return of Invesco QQQ Trust up to a cap while providing a buffer against the first 10% decline on an annual basis. This series begins on May 1 of each year QMY was launched on May 6, 2026 and is issued by Corgi.
